name: Guardragon Reincarnation
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>転</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>臨</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>守</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>護</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ご</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by banishing Fusion Materials listed on it, that are all Link Monsters, from your field or GY. You can only activate 1 "Guardragon Reincarnation" per turn.
eff: Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by banishing Fusion Materials listed on it, that are all Link Monsters, from your field or GY. You can only activate 1 "Guardragon Reincarnation" per turn.

action: Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the player's Graveyard as Fusion Materials
Can only use certain Fusion Materials
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes Fusion Materials used in a Fusion Summon
